items.name_en: .💖[Full set of original green packaging]💞Small GG shoulder bag. The GG pattern is reinterpreted every season, accumulating decades of rich heritage. This symbol not only represents the initials of the brand's founder but also subtly pays tribute to the Gucci houndstooth pattern originating from the 1930s. By merging different eras of Gucci's history, this pattern honors the brand's origins while innovating. This black small shoulder bag features an interlocking letter pattern. Hidden Details · Black embossed GG leather · Gold-tone hardware · As a selected item with a Gucci Tag, this product supports NFC technology to help verify authenticity and enjoy a digital innovation experience. Cotton-linen lining · Inside: 1 zip pocket · Handle height: 15cm · Detachable shoulder strap (30cm high) · Double G and rivet lock · Weight: approx. 0.6kg.

items.name_cn:
.💖[Full set of original green packaging]💖
Gucci New Arrival Introduction: Immersed in retro sentiment, the Ophidia family welcomes a new member—a medium tote bag. The square shape evokes retro design. The GG high-quality canvas is embellished with red and green webbing, the brand's most distinctive classic elements, paying tribute to the brand's equestrian origins. Ophidia Web
Model: 503876.
Size: 32.5*20*10cm.
Color: Brown/pvc.

items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖GG fabric is a classic material widely used in the brand's handbag and apparel series. In the Gucci Insignia fashion collection, this high-recognizability classic jacquard fabric returns, using a full-body layout design to inject rich details into many classic luggage pieces. Brown leather trim adds charm to this backpack. For more details. Beige and ivory white GG jacquard fabric, beige leather trim, gold-tone hardware.

items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖Gucci Attache Small Shoulder Bag. The charm of GG Crystal Canvas interprets the 2023 Fall/Winter Men's Accessories collection, with a glossy surface and durable properties injecting contemporary style into the brand's classic design. This small shoulder bag features a recognizable crescent shape, and the G-hook buckle adds design aesthetics. Classic hardware combined with soft materials interprets vintage charm in a beautiful and romantic way. Black GG Crystal Canvas, palladium-tone hardware, red and blue striped webbing, also comes with a leather shoulder strap, detachable webbing shoulder strap (45cm high) G-hook with zipper.

items.name_en: !!️With full original green box packaging!!️GG Marmont Mini Shoulder Bag. The GG Marmont chain strap mini shoulder bag features a structured soft shape and an oversized flap closure, with GG metal hardware. The sliding chain shoulder strap has multiple carrying methods, allowing for free switching between shoulder and hand carry. It features wavy quilted leather with a GG logo on the back. Wavy quilted leather with a GG logo, retro gold-tone metal hardware with double G, sliding chain strap adjustable to a shoulder strap height of 55cm, or a top handle height of 30cm. Can also be used as a crossbody bag. Spring buckle flap, weight: approx. 0.6kg.

items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖GG MARMONT MATLASS mini bucket bag style. Inspired by the natural earth tones, Gucci's enduring design continues to present new iterations season after season. For the 2023 Spring/Summer collection, sage green enriches the latest leather selections, a timeless color that stands the test of time. Here, it enriches a signature GG Marmont mini bucket bag with gold double-G hardware. Sage green Matlass chevron leather, gold hardware, cloud print and microfiber lining, suede-like surface, detachable double-G charm, 2 card slots, chain strap, drop 23.6 inches, drawstring closure, also wearable as a crossbody bag.

items.name_en: 💖With full original green packaging💖Jackie 1961 series waist pack!!️ In the Gucci Beloved collection, the Jackie 1961 series is constantly renewed, launching multiple travel accessories. This waist pack is made of classic GG Supreme canvas, adorned with the brand's iconic red and green webbing. GUCCI BELOVED selects a new fashion item every season, reinterpreting the brand's classic designs. Hidden details: Beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, brown leather trim, gold-tone hardware, red and green webbing, microfiber lining. Inside: 1 leather open pocket. Snap closure and push-in lock.

items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖Intro: The new Beloved fashion collection tells moving stories with color. Supreme is a representative fabric of the brand, inspired by 1930s archival designs. The classic brown and ebony design, reinterpreted, conveys the brand's enduring design essence. This pattern also becomes a signature highlight on this Ophidia series mini shoulder bag. Material features boutique-quality PVC with high-density webbing and high-end smooth vintage bronze hardware.

Supreme is a representative fabric of the brand, inspired by 1930s vintage designs. The classic brown and ebony designs, reinterpreted with a fresh look, convey the brand's enduring design essence. This pattern also becomes a signature highlight on this Ophidia series mini shoulder bag. The material features boutique-quality PVC paired with high-density webbing, and high-end smooth vintage bronze hardware.
Model: 696180.
Size: 17.5x13x6cm.
Color: Brown/pvc.

items.name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖GG👉The 'Gucci Cosmogonie' series made its debut at the historic Castello di Monte Castello in Italy. On the runway, aesthetic elements from different eras and locations complemented each other, connecting the past with the present. This new crescent-shaped shoulder bag is a runway piece, drawing inspiration from the brand's vintage elements. It is crafted from soft leather and features the double-G logo that appeared in the 1970s. Brown soft leather, shiny gold-tone accessories. Interior: 1 zip pocket. This bag comes with an extra shoulder strap that can be fastened to the bag with a buckle, and an adjustable shoulder strap with a double-G magnetic snap closure.

items.name_en: 💖Includes full original green gift bag💖Gucci Blondie series large tote bag. The circular interlocking double-G, a heritage design of the brand, is masterfully interpreted in the Gucci Blondie series. This Gucci Blondie series tote bag is masterfully crafted from brown suede, featuring a handle and chain shoulder strap design, and reinterpreting the brand's heritage with gold-tone accessories, showcasing the extraordinary charm of a classic piece. Brown suede

Brown suede
Gold-tone accessories, microfiber lining, circular interlocking double-G. Interior: 1 zip pocket. Handle height 22cm, magnetic closure.
Model: 747372.
Size: 52(W)x 35(H)x 9cm(D)
Color: Brown/suede.
Weight: approx. 1.3kg
Made in Italy

items.name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖Ophidia series GG mini shoulder bag. As one of the brand's representative fabrics, GG denim is inspired by 1930s vintage designs. On this denim, the classic beige and ebony colorways are reinterpreted in black and gray for a sincere tribute to the brand's enduring design essence. This pattern is a bright highlight on this Ophidia series mini shoulder bag, showcasing a unique style. Black and gray GG denim, silver-tone accessories, cotton-linen blend lining with double-G. Handle: 3cm(H) chain strap (50cm(H)) lock closure. Weight: approx. 0.5kg.

items.name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖Ophidia GG Small Shoulder Bag. The Ophidia collection for the 2024 Pre-Fall season features shoulder bags, totes, and handbags crafted from GG black denim, cleverly incorporating silver-tone metal hardware to create a playful contrast. Black and grey GG denim, silver-tone hardware, cotton-linen blend lining, double G, double G pendant zipper pull, interior open pocket, adjustable shoulder strap (44cm high). Crossbody wear. Zipper closure, weight: approx. 0.39kg.

items.name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖Gucci Horsebit Slim Small Denim Shoulder Bag. This Gucci Horsebit Slim shoulder bag is crafted from the new GG black denim fabric from the 2024 Pre-Fall collection, featuring silver-tone hardware on the strap to create a metallic texture and highlight a contrasting aesthetic. Black leather trim and tonal key charm add fullness to the design. Black and grey GG denim, black leather trim, as a selected item for the Gucci Tag, this product supports NFC technology for a digital innovative experience. Silk lining, slender silhouette with horsebit detail, leather key charm, shoulder strap (20cm high). Zipper closure.
